title: notholaena marantae
intro: Notholaena marantae, also known as the fern-like plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Notholaena marantae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
